page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI413 or TLPL423.

Formerly: EDCI413.

TLPL424 Interdisciplinary Teaching in the Middle Grades II (2 Credits) For prospective middle school teachers. Planning and implementing interdisciplinary instructional practices in middle school. Draws on the context of and experiences in the student teaching placement. Use of technology and incorporation of technology into instruction. Prerequisite: EDCI360 and TLPL423.
